description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python cibuildwheel that runs on push to master, develop, actions_pypi branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job across multiple Python versions and operating systems to check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, extract version information, build and test wheels with cibuildwheel, and upload artifacts. A subsequent job uploads the built wheels to PyPI or TestPyPI based on the GitHub reference.
